name: 10th Standard Mark Sheet
format_notes: Clear scan or PDF of original certificate. Name should match across all documents.

name: 12th / HSC Mark Sheet
format_notes: All semester marks for diploma candidates.

name: NATA Score Card
format_notes: All attempts. Best NATA score will be considered as per COA rules.

name: JEE (Main) Paper-2 B.Arch Score Card
required_for: Candidates qualifying through JEE Paper 2 (alternative to NATA)
format_notes: Higher of NATA or JEE Paper 2 will be used in the merit calculation.

name: Nativity Certificate
required_for: Tamil Nadu native candidates who studied outside Tamil Nadu
format_notes: Electronic form / digitally signed e-Certificate issued by the Government of Tamil Nadu only.

name: Permanent Community Certificate
required_for: BC / BCM / MBC & DNC / SC / SCA / ST candidates
format_notes: Permanent card / electronic / digitally signed e-Certificate. Must be issued before the registration close date.
certificate_authority: ST: RDO/Sub Collector. SC/SCA: Tahsildar of native taluk. BC/BCM/MBC/DNC: HQ Deputy Tahsildar / Zonal Deputy Tahsildar.

name: Parental Income Certificate
required_for: Candidates applying for First Graduate concession or PMSS

name: First Graduate Certificate
required_for: Candidates claiming First Graduate tuition fee concession
format_notes: Includes father, mother, grandparents, brother, sister names. Joint declaration by candidate and parent.

name: Government School Study Proof (6th to 12th)
required_for: Candidates claiming 7.5% Government School preferential quota

name: Ex-Servicemen Certificate + Discharge Certificate
certificate_authority: Tamil Nadu Dept of Ex-Servicemen Welfare (Asst. Director or above)

name: Persons with Benchmark Disabilities Certificate
format_notes: From a Medical Board (minimum 3 doctors) of the district, in the prescribed format. Certificates from individual doctors are not accepted.

name: Sports Achievement Certificates
format_notes: Original sports certificates with the appropriate forms per Annexure III of the brochure.
